user.title: Connect to Sendspin BT Bridge
user.description: Enter the bridge's host and port. **Leave the token blank to auto-pair on HAOS** — the bridge will mint a token via Supervisor automatically. If auto-pair isn't available, open the bridge web UI and pick **Settings → Home Assistant → Bearer tokens for HA custom_component → Generate token**.

pair.title: Sendspin BT Bridge discovered at {host}:{port}
pair.description: Open [{ui_url}]({ui_url}) → **Settings → Home Assistant → Bearer tokens for HA custom_component → Generate token**, then paste the token below.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Sendspin BT Bridge
reauth_confirm.description: Your bearer token was rejected. Open [{ui_url}]({ui_url}) → **Settings → Home Assistant → Bearer tokens for HA custom_component → Generate token** to mint a fresh one, then paste it below.

error.auth_failed: Token rejected — make sure it was just minted and not revoked.
error.auto_pair_failed: Could not auto-pair via Supervisor — paste a token from the bridge web UI (Settings → Home Assistant → Bearer tokens for HA custom_component → Generate token).

abort.missing_host_id: Bridge mDNS advertisement is missing the host_id TXT record.
